headline: How Restaurant Brands Can Navigate the Beverage Race
summary: Something has shifted in the beverage business over the past 24 months, and much of the industry coverage has missed an interesting storyline. Yes, McDonald’s is rolling out a national crafted beverage lineup. Yes, Taco Bell is targeting five billion dollars in beverage sales by 2030. Yes, KFC’s Kwench is scaling to roughly three thousand […]

headline: McDonald's Corp Stock May Have Hit Bottom - Ways to Play MCD Stock
summary: McDonald's Corp. stock has tumbled based on fears about how gas prices have affected sales. But it may have been overdone, especially now that gas prices are falling. This article looks at ways to play MCD.
